description: Cazoo is a UK car marketplace for browsing used cars and vans from dealers. On the public web presence examined, no general developer API documentation was found beyond the catalog-listed MCP endpoint.
summary: Cazoo exposes a public MCP server at `https://apimanagement.cazoo.co.uk/chat-gpt-app/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `cazoo.co.uk`.
